table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Informações sobre a utilização do elemento

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Número mínimo e máximo de vezes que o elemento pode aparecer na instância

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

tr.td:
Ocupação do ACS segundo a CBO
Vínculo: Ocupações permitidas para o ACS no AgroSUS (required)

vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

description.value: Perfil do vínculo do Agente Comunitário de Saúde ou Técnico em Agente Comunitário de Saúde com a organização responsável pelo atendimento no AgroSUS.

short.value: Roles/organizations the practitioner is associated with

definition.value: A specific set of Roles/Locations/specialties/services that a practitioner may perform at an organization for a period of time.

human.value: If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource

expression.value: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()

xpath.value: not(exists(for $id in f:contained/*/f:id/@value return $contained[not(parent::*/descendant::f:reference/@value=concat('#', $contained/*/id/@value) or descendant::f:reference[@value='#'])]))

human.value: If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label

valueMarkdown.value: When a resource has no narrative, only systems that fully understand the data can display the resource to a human safely. Including a human readable representation in the resource makes for a much more robust eco-system and cheaper handling of resources by intermediary systems. Some ecosystems restrict distribution of resources to only those systems that do fully understand the resources, and as a consequence implementers may believe that the narrative is superfluous. However experience shows that such eco-systems often open up to new participants over time.

human.value: A resource should have narrative for robust management

short.value: Identificador lógico deste artefato

definition.value: Identificador lógico deste artefato

comment.value: The only time that a resource does not have an id is when it is being submitted to the server using a create operation.

short.value: Metadados sobre o recurso

definition.value: Metadados sobre o recurso

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Um conjunto de regras sob as quais este conteúdo foi criado

definition.value: Um conjunto de regras sob as quais este conteúdo foi criado

comment.value: Asserting this rule set restricts the content to be only understood by a limited set of trading partners. This inherently limits the usefulness of the data in the long term. However, the existing health eco-system is highly fractured, and not yet ready to define, collect, and exchange data in a generally computable sense. Wherever possible, implementers and/or specification writers should avoid using this element. Often, when used, the URL is a reference to an implementation guide that defines these special rules as part of it's narrative along with other profiles, value sets, etc.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

isModifierReason.value: This element is labeled as a modifier because the implicit rules may provide additional knowledge about the resource that modifies it's meaning or interpretation

short.value: Idioma do recurso

definition.value: Idioma do recurso

comment.value: Language is provided to support indexing and accessibility (typically, services such as text to speech use the language tag). The html language tag in the narrative applies to the narrative. The language tag on the resource may be used to specify the language of other presentations generated from the data in the resource. Not all the content has to be in the base language. The Resource.language should not be assumed to apply to the narrative automatically. If a language is specified, it should it also be specified on the div element in the html (see rules in HTML5 for information about the relationship between xml:lang and the html lang attribute).

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Resumo do texto do recurso em linguagem natural

definition.value: Resumo do texto do recurso em linguagem natural

comment.value: Contained resources do not have narrative. Resources that are not contained SHOULD have a narrative. In some cases, a resource may only have text with little or no additional discrete data (as long as all minOccurs=1 elements are satisfied). This may be necessary for data from legacy systems where information is captured as a "text blob" or where text is additionally entered raw or narrated and encoded information is added later.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Contained, inline Resources

definition.value: Recursos contidos no recurso

comment.value: This should never be done when the content can be identified properly, as once identification is lost, it is extremely difficult (and context dependent) to restore it again. Contained resources may have profiles and tags In their meta elements, but SHALL NOT have security labels.

definition.value: Extensões adicionais que não fazem parte do modelo base

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: Extensões adicionais que não podem ser ignoradas, mesmo que não reconhecidas

definition.value: Extensões adicionais que não podem ser ignoradas, mesmo que não reconhecidas

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

isModifierReason.value: Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the resource that contains them

short.value: Identificadores externos para este recurso

definition.value: Identificadores externos para este recurso

requirements.value: Often, specific identities are assigned for the agent.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

definition.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

description.value: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

short.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

definition.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: Uso do identificador

definition.value: Uso do identificador

comment.value: Applications can assume that an identifier is permanent unless it explicitly says that it is temporary.

requirements.value: Allows the appropriate identifier for a particular context of use to be selected from among a set of identifiers.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

isModifierReason.value: This is labeled as "Is Modifier" because applications should not mistake a temporary id for a permanent one.

short.value: Tipo do identificador

definition.value: Tipo do identificador

comment.value: This element deals only with general categories of identifiers. It SHOULD not be used for codes that correspond 1..1 with the Identifier.system. Some identifiers may fall into multiple categories due to common usage. Where the system is known, a type is unnecessary because the type is always part of the system definition. However systems often need to handle identifiers where the system is not known. There is not a 1:1 relationship between type and system, since many different systems have the same type.

requirements.value: Allows users to make use of identifiers when the identifier system is not known.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

description.value: A coded type for an identifier that can be used to determine which identifier to use for a specific purpose.

short.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

definition.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

description.value: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

short.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

definition.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: Código do identificador definido pelo sistema terminologico

definition.value: Código do identificador definido pelo sistema terminologico

comment.value: Codes may be defined very casually in enumerations, or code lists, up to very formal definitions such as SNOMED CT - see the HL7 v3 Core Principles for more information. Ordering of codings is undefined and SHALL NOT be used to infer meaning. Generally, at most only one of the coding values will be labeled as UserSelected = true.

requirements.value: Allows for alternative encodings within a code system, and translations to other code systems.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

definition.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

description.value: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

short.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

definition.value: Conteúdo adicional definido por implementações

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: Sistema de terminologia

definition.value: Sistema de terminologia

comment.value: The URI may be an OID (urn:oid:...) or a UUID (urn:uuid:...). OIDs and UUIDs SHALL be references to the HL7 OID registry. Otherwise, the URI should come from HL7's list of FHIR defined special URIs or it should reference to some definition that establishes the system clearly and unambiguously.

requirements.value: Need to be unambiguous about the source of the definition of the symbol.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Versão do sistema de terminologia, se relevante

definition.value: Versão do sistema de terminologia, se relevante

comment.value: Where the terminology does not clearly define what string should be used to identify code system versions, the recommendation is to use the date (expressed in FHIR date format) on which that version was officially published as the version date.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Conteúdo definido pelo sistema de terminologia

definition.value: Conteúdo definido pelo sistema de terminologia

requirements.value: Need to refer to a particular code in the system.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Representação definida pelo sistema de terminologia

definition.value: Representação definida pelo sistema de terminologia

requirements.value: Need to be able to carry a human-readable meaning of the code for readers that do not know the system.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: C*E.2 - but note this is not well followed

short.value: Se este código foi selecionado diretamente pelo usuário

definition.value: Se este código foi selecionado diretamente pelo usuário

comment.value: Amongst a set of alternatives, a directly chosen code is the most appropriate starting point for new translations. There is some ambiguity about what exactly 'directly chosen' implies, and trading partner agreement may be needed to clarify the use of this element and its consequences more completely.

requirements.value: This has been identified as a clinical safety criterium - that this exact system/code pair was chosen explicitly, rather than inferred by the system based on some rules or language processing.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:mapsTo dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected fhir:hasMap fhir:Coding.userSelected.map. fhir:Coding.userSelected.map a fhir:Map; fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale. fhir:Coding.userSelected\#true a [ fhir:source "true"; fhir:target dt:CDCoding.codingRationale\#O ]

short.value: Representação em texto do conceito

definition.value: Representação em texto do conceito

comment.value: Very often the text is the same as a displayName of one of the codings.

requirements.value: The codes from the terminologies do not always capture the correct meaning with all the nuances of the human using them, or sometimes there is no appropriate code at all. In these cases, the text is used to capture the full meaning of the source.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: C*E.9. But note many systems use C*E.2 for this

short.value: Namespace do valor do identificador

definition.value: Namespace do valor do identificador

comment.value: Identifier.system is always case sensitive.

requirements.value: There are many sets of identifiers. To perform matching of two identifiers, we need to know what set we're dealing with. The system identifies a particular set of unique identifiers.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Valor do identificador

definition.value: Valor do identificador

comment.value: If the value is a full URI, then the system SHALL be urn:ietf:rfc:3986. The value's primary purpose is computational mapping. As a result, it may be normalized for comparison purposes (e.g. removing non-significant whitespace, dashes, etc.) A value formatted for human display can be conveyed using the [Rendered Value extension](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extension-rendered-value.html). Identifier.value is to be treated as case sensitive unless knowledge of the Identifier.system allows the processer to be confident that non-case-sensitive processing is safe.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: II.extension or II.root if system indicates OID or GUID (Or Role.id.extension or root)

short.value: Período de tempo em que o identificador é/foi válido para uso

definition.value: Período de tempo em que o identificador é/foi válido para uso

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Referência à organização que emitiu esse identificador

definition.value: Referência à organização que emitiu esse identificador

comment.value: The Identifier.assigner may omit the .reference element and only contain a .display element reflecting the name or other textual information about the assigning organization.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: II.assigningAuthorityName but note that this is an improper use by the definition of the field. Also Role.scoper

short.value: Indica se o vínculo profissional está ativo

definition.value: Informa se esta função do profissional está ativa

comment.value: If this value is false, you may refer to the period to see when the role was in active use. If there is no period specified, no inference can be made about when it was active.

requirements.value: Need to be able to mark a practitioner role record as not to be used because it was created in error, or otherwise no longer in active use.

meaningWhenMissing.value: This resource is generally assumed to be active if no value is provided for the active element

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Período de validade do vínculo do ACS com a organização

definition.value: Período durante o qual o profissional está autorizado a exercer essa função

requirements.value: Even after the agencies is revoked, the fact that it existed must still be recorded.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: (ServD maps Practitioners and Organizations via another entity, so this concept is not available)

short.value: ACS ou Técnico em ACS que exerce esta função

definition.value: Referência ao profissional

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: UBS à qual o ACS está vinculado

definition.value: Referência à organização

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Ocupação do ACS segundo a CBO

definition.value: Códigos das funções dos profissionais de saúde

comment.value: A person may have more than one role.

requirements.value: Need to know what authority the practitioner has - what can they do?

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value: PRD-1 / STF-18 / PRA-3 / PRT-4 / ROL-3 / ORC-12 / OBR-16 / PV1-7 / PV1-8 / PV1-9 / PV1-17
(ServD maps Practitioners and Organizations via another entity, so this concept is not available)

short.value: Especialidades do profissional

definition.value: Especialidades do profissional

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Local onde o ACS exerce suas atividades

definition.value: Referência ao local de atuação do profissional

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

map.value:
(ServD maps Practitioners and Organizations via another entity, so this concept is not available)
However these are accessed via the Site.ServiceSite.ServiceSiteProvider record. (The Site has the location)

short.value: Serviço de saúde associado à atuação do ACS

definition.value: Referência à lista de serviços especializados deste profissional

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Contato profissional relacionado ao vínculo

definition.value: Contatos para a função/local/serviço

requirements.value: Often practitioners have a dedicated line for each location (or service) that they work at, and need to be able to define separate contact details for each of these.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Horários disponíveis

definition.value: Horários disponíveis

comment.value: More detailed availability information may be provided in associated Schedule/Slot resources.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

definition.value: Identificador único para referência cruzada

Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

short.value: Extensões que não podem ser ignoradas mesmo que não sejam reconhecidas

definition.value: Extensões que não podem ser ignoradas mesmo que não sejam reconhecidas

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

isModifierReason.value: Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them

short.value: Dias da semana: seg| ter| qua| qui| sex| sab | dom

definition.value: Dias da semana: seg| ter| qua| qui| sex| sab | dom

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Sempre disponível? sim ou não, por exemplo: serviço 24 horas

definition.value: Sempre disponível? por exemplo: serviço 24 horas

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Horario de abertura (ignorado se allDay = true)

definition.value: Horário de abertura (ignorado se allDay = true)

comment.value: The timezone is expected to be for where this HealthcareService is provided at.

short.value: Não disponível durante este período

short.value: Motivo porquê o horário não está disponível

definition.value: Motivo porquê o horário não está disponível

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Serviço indisponível a partir desta data

definition.value: Serviço indisponível a partir desta data

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Descrição das exceções de disponibilidade

definition.value: Descrição das exceções de disponibilidade

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Endpoints técnicos que fornecem acesso a serviços eletrônicos operados pela organização

definition.value: Endpoints técnicos que fornecem acesso a serviços eletrônicos operados pela organização

requirements.value: Organizations have multiple systems that provide various services and ,ay also be different for practitioners too. So the endpoint satisfies the need to be able to define the technical connection details for how to connect to them, and for what purpose.

human.value: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

short.value: Indica se o vínculo profissional está ativo
Período de validade do vínculo do ACS com a organização
ACS ou Técnico em ACS que exerce esta função
UBS à qual o ACS está vinculado
Ocupação do ACS segundo a CBO
Local onde o ACS exerce suas atividades
Serviço de saúde associado à atuação do ACS
Contato profissional relacionado ao vínculo
